stdout:
## Success criteria from issue description
- ✅ `CubicExt<C>` with `c0/c1/c2`, constructors/accessors, `norm()`, Karatsuba 6-mul multiply, adjugate/norm inversion, `ConstField`, ref-forwarded ops, `AddAssign`, `Display`, `Debug`, and `Copy` size check are present (`crates/gf2-core/src/gfpn/cubic.rs`, e.g. `93-206`, `328-357`, `473-573`, `379-467`, `647-685`, `877-879`).
- ✅ Required behavioral tests are present: field axiom harness over `(0..7)^3` strategy (`604-609`), multiplication cross-check (`773-815`), inversion round-trip (`821-837`), defining relation `v^3 = β` (`711-716`), and degree/order/characteristic (`691-704`).
- ❌ **Embedding success criterion is not met as written**: issue requires `Fq3::from(Fp::new(k)) == ...`, but there is no `From<BaseField>` impl for `CubicExt` (no `impl From<...> for CubicExt<...>` found), and tests use `from_base(...)` instead (`635-640`, `715`), so the specified API contract is unmet.

## Separation of concerns
- ✅ Changes are confined to `gf2-core` (`crates/gf2-core/src/gfpn/cubic.rs` plus `gfpn/mod.rs` export), with no upward dependency violation into `gf2-coding`.

## Functional paradigm and performance
- ✅ High-level arithmetic is clean and compositional (value-returning ops, minimal mutation), while multiplication uses the intended Karatsuba-style 6-mul formula (`328-357`), matching the performance-oriented design goal for extension arithmetic.

## Correctness
- ✅ Algebraic correctness is strongly exercised by exhaustive/representative tests and inversion checks.
- ℹ️ BitVec-specific invariants (tail masking, bit numbering) are not touched by this change set, so no new risk introduced there.

## Testing
- ✅ Comprehensive local tests for this feature are included (axioms, multiplication equivalence, inversion, embedding helper, formatting, operator forwarding, size/layout).
- ✅ Gate metadata for this issue shows `tests`, `clippy`, and `fmt` all passed in the latest run.
- ❌ Despite green gates, review fails due unmet embedding API criterion (`From<BaseField>`).

## Unsafe isolation
- ✅ No `unsafe` introduced in the new cubic extension implementation; unsafe isolation policy remains intact.

## Documentation
- ✅ Public type and major APIs include doc comments and examples; non-trivial operations document complexity/panics where appropriate.
- ⚠️ The documented/implemented embedding API is `from_base`, which diverges from the issue’s explicit `From<BaseField>` deliverable.

## Prior review feedback
- ✅ `run_history` is empty, so there are no prior unresolved review items to re-check.

## Jit issue dependencies
- ✅ Declared prerequisite `0203bebd` is in `done` state and this work builds on its `ExtConfig` pattern.

VERDICT: FAIL
---
Gate result: FAILED
